mapper.sql: id, admin_name, admin_phone, user_id, create_time, update_time,is_delete
mapper.select:
select rb.id as id, admin_name as name, admin_phone as phone, user_id userId,ui.is_enable as isloginAccountEnable,ui.user_name as loginName, ull.login_number as loginCount,ui.create_time as createTime ,ull.login_time as loginTime from base_admin rb LEFT JOIN security_login.user_info ui ON rb.user_id = ui.id LEFT JOIN security_login.user_login_log ull ON ui.user_name= ull.user_name where rb.is_delete = 0
and admin_name like concat('%',#{keyWord},'%')
